mapper.select:
SELECT co.id AS ownershipId, co.tenant_id AS tenantId, co.percentage AS percentage, co.owner_type AS ownerType, co.read_only AS readOnly, co.partner_tenant_id AS partnerTenantId,
CASE WHEN co.owner_type = 'group' THEN CONCAT('G_', co.partner_tenant_id) WHEN co.owner_type = 'user' THEN CONCAT('U_', co.account_id) ELSE CONCAT('O_', co.account_id) END AS accountId,
CASE WHEN co.owner_type = 'group' THEN t_partner.code WHEN co.owner_type = 'user' THEN u.login_id ELSE o.owner_code END AS accountName,
CASE WHEN co.owner_type = 'group' THEN 'Group Equity' WHEN co.owner_type = 'user' THEN u.name ELSE o.name END AS name,
CASE WHEN co.owner_type = 'group' THEN 'GROUP' WHEN co.owner_type = 'user' THEN u.role ELSE 'OWNER' END AS role,
CASE WHEN co.owner_type = 'owner' AND t.owner_id != co.account_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isExternalPartner FROM tenant_ownership co LEFT JOIN owner o ON co.account_id = o.id AND co.owner_type = 'owner' LEFT JOIN user u ON co.account_id = u.id AND co.owner_type = 'user' LEFT JOIN tenant t ON co.tenant_id = t.id LEFT JOIN tenant t_partner ON co.partner_tenant_id = t_partner.id AND co.owner_type = 'group' WHERE co.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY co.sort_order ASC, co.id ASC

SELECT coh.id AS ownershipId, coh.tenant_id AS tenantId, coh.percentage AS percentage, coh.owner_type AS ownerType, coh.read_only AS readOnly, coh.partner_tenant_id AS partnerTenantId,
CASE WHEN coh.owner_type = 'group' THEN CONCAT('G_', coh.partner_tenant_id) WHEN coh.owner_type = 'user' THEN CONCAT('U_', coh.account_id) ELSE CONCAT('O_', coh.account_id) END AS accountId,
CASE WHEN coh.owner_type = 'group' THEN t_partner.code WHEN coh.owner_type = 'user' THEN u.login_id ELSE o.owner_code END AS accountName,
CASE WHEN coh.owner_type = 'group' THEN 'Group Equity' WHEN coh.owner_type = 'user' THEN u.name ELSE o.name END AS name,
CASE WHEN coh.owner_type = 'group' THEN 'GROUP' WHEN coh.owner_type = 'user' THEN u.role ELSE 'OWNER' END AS role,
CASE WHEN coh.owner_type = 'owner' AND t.owner_id != coh.account_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isExternalPartner FROM tenant_ownership_history coh LEFT JOIN owner o ON coh.account_id = o.id AND coh.owner_type = 'owner' LEFT JOIN user u ON coh.account_id = u.id AND coh.owner_type = 'user' LEFT JOIN tenant t ON coh.tenant_id = t.id LEFT JOIN tenant t_partner ON coh.partner_tenant_id = t_partner.id AND coh.owner_type = 'group' WHERE coh.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND coh.effective_month = #{effectiveMonth} ORDER BY coh.id ASC

SELECT * FROM ( -- ① 公司的直属主要 Owner -- SELECT DISTINCT NULL AS ownershipId, t.id AS tenantId, NULL AS percentage, 'owner' AS ownerType, NULL AS partnerTenantId, CONCAT('O_', o.id) AS accountId, o.owner_code AS accountName, o.name AS name, 'OWNER' AS role, 0 AS isExternalPartner FROM owner o JOIN tenant t ON o.id = t.owner_id WHERE t.id = #{tenantId} AND o.status = 'ACTIVE' UNION ALL -- ② 关联了该公司的合伙人 User (PARTNERSHIP 角色) -- SELECT DISTINCT NULL AS ownershipId, uta.tenant_id AS tenantId, NULL AS percentage, 'user' AS ownerType, NULL AS partnerTenantId, CONCAT('U_', u.id) AS accountId, u.login_id AS accountName, u.name AS name, 'PARTNERSHIP' AS role, 0 AS isExternalPartner FROM user u JOIN user_tenant_access uta ON u.id = uta.user_id WHERE uta.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND u.role = 'PARTNERSHIP' AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' UNION ALL -- ③ 系统中所有的活跃集团 (作为 GROUP 股东选项) -- SELECT DISTINCT NULL AS ownershipId, #{tenantId} AS tenantId, NULL AS percentage, 'group' AS ownerType, g.id AS partnerTenantId, CONCAT('G_', g.id) AS accountId, CONCAT('Group: ', g.code) AS accountName, 'Group Equity' AS name, 'GROUP' AS role, 0 AS isExternalPartner FROM tenant g WHERE g.tenant_type = 'GROUP' AND g.status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS candidates ORDER BY accountName ASC

SELECT id, tenant_type AS tenantType, code, name, owner_id AS ownerId, parent_id AS parentId, expiration_date AS expirationDate, status, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tenant WHERE code = #{code} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, owner_code AS ownerCode, name, email, status, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt FROM owner WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
SELECT id, owner_code AS ownerCode, name, email, status, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt FROM owner WHERE UPPER(owner_code) = UPPER(#{code}) AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, tenant_type AS tenantType, code, name, owner_id AS ownerId, parent_id AS parentId, status FROM tenant WHERE UPPER(code) = UPPER(#{code}) AND tenant_type = 'GROUP' AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant_ownership (tenant_id, account_id, owner_type, partner_tenant_id, percentage, read_only, sort_order) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{accountId}, #{ownerType}, #{partnerTenantId}, #{percentage}, #{readOnly}, #{sortOrder})

INSERT INTO tenant_ownership ( tenant_id, account_id, owner_type, partner_tenant_id, percentage, read_only, sort_order ) VALUES
(#{item.tenantId}, #{item.accountId}, #{item.ownerType}, #{item.partnerTenantId}, #{item.percentage}, #{item.readOnly}, #{item.sortOrder})

INSERT INTO tenant_ownership_history ( tenant_id, effective_month, account_id, owner_type, partner_tenant_id, percentage, read_only, saved_by, saved_at ) VALUES
(#{item.tenantId}, #{item.effectiveMonth}, #{item.accountId}, #{item.ownerType}, #{item.partnerTenantId}, #{item.percentage}, #{item.readOnly}, #{item.savedBy}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tenant_ownership_history WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND effective_month = #{effectiveMonth}
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant SET parent_id = #{parentId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{tenantId} AND owner_id = #{ownerId} AND tenant_type = 'COMPANY' AND status = 'ACTIVE'
